entries.text:
Verses 1-11

CHAPTER 50

The Servant Speaks of His Determination and Suffering

(Isaiah 50:1-3 belong to the preceding chapter.)

1. The cause of Zion’s present desolation (Isaiah 50:1-3) 2. The Servant’s self-witness (Isaiah 50:4) 3. His obedience and His suffering (Isaiah 50:5-6) 4. His victorious triumph (Isaiah 50:7-9) 5. The two classes: Those who fear Him and those who reject Him (Isaiah 50:10-11) The Suffering One is speaking. Little comment is needed on this chapter if the reader will use the above outline.
